# ona_runner (Resource)

Ona Runner. This beta resource is import/read-only for brownfield dogfood workflows.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ona_runner" "example" {}

import {
  to = ona_runner.example
  id = "runner-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Runner ID. Use this value as the Terraform import ID.
- `name` (String) Runner display name.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ona_runner.example "runner-id"
```
